text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While we continued training day by day
toward the Hanshin Juvenile Fillies, at the
same time…
choice_data_list: (I need to grow more as a trainer!)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I still have a long way to go to match
Buena Vista's ability. As I was thinking that,
I spotted Buena Vista… and company.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, Nakayama's stories are always so
exciting… I love them!

Buena Vista.
Our ever-popular star! The academy's heroine,
loved by everyone.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Heh. Keep taking risks, and that's what
happens. …Wanna give it a try?

And this here's Nakayama Festa.
A bit of an outlaw vibe, but she's a fiery
gambler with a passionate heart.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Nakayama, seriously, cut it out.
Buena's way too pure for that stuff.

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
Hehe…
Everyone's so lively today, it's lovely to see.

Tosen Jordan, a gutsy gal!
And Wonder Acute, a warm person, like
a grandma.
choice_data_list: I get it… wait, who even are you!?

text_block_list.name: Transcend
text_block_list.text:
Hey hey～!
The academy's very own information broker,
Transcend, at your service!

text_block_list.name: Transcend
text_block_list.text: You're Buena's trainer, right?

text_block_list.name: Transcend
text_block_list.text:
As you probably know… we're all in the same
class as her, me included.

text_block_list.name: Transcend
text_block_list.text:
So I thought I'd introduce everyone at once～
Pretty stacked group, huh?
choice_data_list: Yeah. They all seem really talented.
Yeah. They all seem really talented.

text_block_list.name: Transcend
text_block_list.text:
If anyone caught your eye, feel free to ask.
I could share a little info, you know?

text_block_list.name: Transcend
text_block_list.text:
Well, I doubt you're interested in anyone but
Buena anyway.
choice_data_list: …By the way, what kind of info?
…By the way, what kind of info?

text_block_list.name: Transcend
text_block_list.text:
Oh, anything you'd want to know.
Whatever helps you out.

text_block_list.name: Transcend
text_block_list.text:
Like ways you could support Buena.
You know… the kind that fills in what you're
lacking.

text_block_list.name: Transcend
text_block_list.text:
Hehe～
Don't underestimate your friendly
neighborhood info broker.

text_block_list.name: Transcend
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, hit me up anytime, yeah?
…This is gonna get interesting♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As her childhood friend, I feel like I know
Buena Vista well. But of course, we haven't
shared every moment together.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If I could learn more about the sides of her
I don't know… I might find a way to support
her better. Maybe even get a little closer
to where she stands…

text_block_list.name: Transcend
text_block_list.text:
Oh? There you are～
Been waiting for you.

text_block_list.name: Transcend
text_block_list.text: You want to know more about Buena, right?
choice_data_list: I think I'm good for now.

text_block_list.name: Transcend
text_block_list.text:
Her everyday school life, huh…
Alright, alright. I've got plenty of tips coming in.

text_block_list.name: Transcend
text_block_list.text:
Oh? Found a good one.
"One time, Buena forgot her paper dictionary
she needed for class…"

text_block_list.name: Transcend
text_block_list.text:
"Word got out, and students from other
classes rushed over to lend theirs.
The hallway turned into chaos, dictionaries
flying everywhere."

text_block_list.name: Transcend
text_block_list.text:
So?
Anything else you wanna ask?

text_block_list.name: Transcend
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, let's see.
Something recent…

text_block_list.name: Transcend
text_block_list.text:
Looks like she's been really into the cafe's
salad bowls lately. Apparently, she tries
a different dressing every time.

text_block_list.name: Transcend
text_block_list.text:
According to a friend who went with her,
"She kept forgetting which ones she hadn't
tried yet, and watching her struggle to decide
was adorable."

text_block_list.name: Transcend
text_block_list.text:
So?
Anything else you wanna ask?

text_block_list.name: Transcend
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, from my point of view, Buena is…
Yeah, she totally has that idol vibe.

text_block_list.name: Transcend
text_block_list.text:
Like, she's all-in on cute! And she's also
very approachable… But at the same time,
she's got this inner strength, there's
something cool about her too.

text_block_list.name: Transcend
text_block_list.text:
Kinda like the center of a big idol group?
She's got that "chosen one" aura, you know～

text_block_list.name: Transcend
text_block_list.text:
So?
Anything else you wanna ask?

text_block_list.name: Transcend
text_block_list.text:
Hey, hey. You've already heard that one,
haven't you? …Oh? Or maybe you've had
your fill already? In that case, we're done
here～

text_block_list.name: Transcend
text_block_list.text: Oh?

text_block_list.name: Transcend
text_block_list.text:
Alright then, one last thing…
A little advice for you, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Transcend
text_block_list.text:
Buena's base stats are seriously high.
If you wanna stand beside her, you've gotta
start by raising your own.

text_block_list.name: Transcend
text_block_list.text:
Basically, put in the work, little by little.
Try learning a bit of everything.

text_block_list.name: Transcend
text_block_list.text:
In the end, it all comes down to how much
effort you've put in. If you want to handle
the unexpected, building a solid foundation
is your best bet.
choice_data_list: You're right… Thanks for the advice!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I started right away, reviewing the basics
in the library. Not just the latest training
theory, but papers from all kinds of fields,
studying comprehensively.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On another day, to better understand what
it feels like to be the one being trained, I
asked a senior trainer to put me through
half a day of a horsegirl's training regimen.

text_block_list.name: Senior Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Hey! You're not keeping your pace!
Your form's falling apart, focus!

text_block_list.name: Senior Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that's it!
Keep that up. Push past tomorrow and into
the day after!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One evening, after training.
As I was going over everything I'd learned
so far, working out a strategy for the next
race…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Excuse me!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for working this late!
I brought you something.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
A late-night snack! I made some rice balls,
and packed a few side dishes, too.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
You haven't had dinner yet, right?
…Come on, let's take a short break.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
…Hey.
Doesn't this feel a little nostalgic?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Back when you were studying for the trainer
academy entrance exams. You used to stay up
late like this, too…
choice_data_list: You'd bring me food back then.
You'd bring me food back then.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. And while you took a break, we'd just
chat about nothing in particular.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
…Though sometimes, even now, I wonder
if I was actually bothering you.
choice_data_list: Not at all… I was really happy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's always been like this.
Watching over me, looking out for me.
…Just like now, in her own quiet way.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Am I pushing myself too hard? Am I under
so much stress? Am I trying too hard?
…That's probably what she's been thinking
about me. But…
choice_data_list: I'll be fine. I can handle it.
I'll be fine. I can handle it.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: …Huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Back during the academy entrance exams,
and even now, nothing has changed. There's
only ever been one motivation, and for that…
I already know I can work as hard as it takes.
choice_data_list: To be by your side, I can do anything.
To be by your side, I can do anything.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
choice_data_list: Will you watch over me… for a while?
Will you watch over me… for a while?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
…Yeah.
Okay!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
There's a lot I want to say… really, a lot!
But… I'll keep it to myself for now.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: You're going to give it your all for me, right?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Then, just for today…
Let me stay by your side a little longer, okay?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: I want to really see who you are right now.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Buena Vista waited until I finished my work.
And as I walked her back to the dorm, we
stepped out of the academy grounds…

text_block_list.name: Transcend
text_block_list.text: Oh? Buena and Trainer… hm?

text_block_list.name: Transcend
text_block_list.text:
Ohoh～?
Well, well…

text_block_list.name: Transcend
text_block_list.text:
Looks like you cleared the event.
Nicely done～

text_block_list.name: Transcend
text_block_list.text:
Guess that means my job here is done?
It'd be kinda sad if this ended in a "just friends"
ending and I had to comfort you, so keep it up,
yeah?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
…Um.
Did something happen between you and Tran?
choice_data_list: …She gave me a lot of helpful advice.
…She gave me a lot of helpful advice.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to Transcend, I've grown a little.
And as I watched the information broker walk
away, I offered a quiet thanks in my heart.
